this_title: Remembering Irma: Voices of St. Martin
trans_title: 记忆中的艾尔玛飓风：圣马丁群众之声
introduction: Irma was the strongest hurricane on record to exist in the open Atlantic region, hitting the Caribbean Island of St Martin on September 6, 2017. This short documentary looks back on the aftermath of this devastating day, and through the words of local islanders, offers a hopeful vision for the future.
chinese_title: 记忆中的艾尔玛飓风：圣马丁群众之声
foreign_title: Remembering Irma: Voices of St. Martin
